title: phonometry: acoustic measurement toolkit for Python (formerly PyOctaveBand)
description: Acoustic measurement toolkit (formerly PyOctaveBand): fractional octave filter banks (ANSI S1.11 / IEC 61260-1), A/C/Z frequency weighting, Fast/Slow/Impulse time weighting, Leq/LAeq/LN/SEL/LCpeak levels and noise dose (IEC 61672-1, IEC 61252), SPL calibration with IEC 60942 validation, and octave spectrograms for Python.
